message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 登录验证

participant "WEB" as WEB
participant "API" as API
participant "PMS" as PMS
participant "Cache" as Cache
database "Redis" as Redis

== 登录验证 ==

WEB -> API: 登录请求，用户名密码
activate API
API -> PMS: 验证
activate PMS
PMS --> API: 验证完成, 返回GUID
deactivate PMS
API -> Cache: 缓存信息
activate Cache
API -> Redis: 如果开启,向redis存储数据
deactivate Cache
API --> WEB: 返回登录信息 access_token(guid)
deactivate API

== 访问后台接口 ==

WEB -> API: SET HTTP HEADER "Authorization: Bearer access_token"
activate API
API -> Cache: 从缓存读取，验证
activate Cache
Cache --> API: 返回
deactivate Cache
API -> Redis: 如果开启，Cache没有从redis读取
activate Redis
Redis --> API: 返回
deactivate Redis
API -> API: 验证有效
API --> WEB: 失败，http code 401
deactivate API

@enduml
```
